description: Golden test cases for content-writer skill evolution

cases.input: Write a short intro paragraph (3-4 sentences) about the benefits of using AI-powered code review tools for software teams.
寫一段產品更新公告：我們的 API 從 v2 升級到 v3，主要變更包括新的認證機制和更好的錯誤處理。
expected_traits: Includes migration guidance or next steps

cases.input: Write a commit message for: Added pagination to the user list API endpoint, supporting cursor-based pagination with configurable page sizes.
